mapper.update: UPDATE CHECK_CARD_APPLICATIONS SET applicant_snapshot = #{applicantSnapshot, typeHandler=aesTypeHandler}, payment_snapshot = #{paymentSnapshot, typeHandler=aesTypeHandler}, application_status = 'REQUESTED', applied_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE check_app_id = #{checkAppId}
UPDATE CHECK_CARD_APPLICATIONS SET application_status = #{applicationStatus}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE check_app_id = #{checkAppId}
mapper.select: SELECT check_app_id FROM CHECK_CARD_APPLICATIONS WHERE application_status = 'DRAFT' AND created_at < SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY
